targets: creator or group links when public
monitoredSourcePlanes.accessNotes: Use public Roblox surfaces only. Do not treat third-party summaries as official metadata.
Use competitor pages to detect freshness gaps, route families, and contradictory code or guide claims.
Capture upload age, repeated phrases, and visible intent clusters.
Use community posts as demand signals only. Verify claims elsewhere before publishing as fact.
Missing is a valid status. Keep `/trello` live when public search demand exists but official links do not surface.

cadence.codes: every 6-12 hours during active update or code windows; daily when stable
cadence.updatesAndEvents: daily while a named update cluster is active
cadence.communityStatus: daily while Trello or Discord demand remains hot without official link resolution
cadence.longTailDiscovery: weekly minimum; increase to daily when YouTube and competitor titles cluster on a named mechanic or entity

agentDecisionRules: Collect a public multi-platform source packet before deciding routes.
Use claim-state labels rather than strong-vs-weak evidence language.
Publish update or status pages when demand is public and the site can answer honestly without inventing facts.
Hold only for duplication, no public source surface, private-only evidence, poor site fit, or no useful internal-link path.
validationAndDeploymentGates: Update metadata, schema, internal links, and sitemap after route changes.
Run lint and build after edits.
Run seo-audit-runner after exported output is refreshed.
Run an exported sitemap-vs-route check before any commit or push.
Source /Users/ah/Documents/GitHub/roblox_monetization/.env before any git push, gh, wrangler, or Cloudflare command.
